entity.summary: Crypto derivatives exchange launched in June 2016, now operating as part of Coinbase after the acquisition closed in August 2025.
entity.notes: Official Deribit history places the launch in June 2016 after more than two years of development. Coinbase announced the completed acquisition on August 14, 2025; Deribit remains an active branded exchange within Coinbase.

events.title: Deribit went live
events.description: Deribit went live in June 2016 after more than two years of development as a cryptocurrency derivatives exchange.
events.notes: The official history establishes the month but not the exact day, so June 1 is used as a month-level placeholder.

events.title: Coinbase completed its acquisition of Deribit
events.description: Coinbase announced that it had closed the acquisition of Deribit, making Deribit part of Coinbase while the Deribit exchange continued operating.
events.notes: Coinbase published the closing announcement on August 14, 2025; Deribit's own post is dated August 13 in its article metadata. HEI uses the Coinbase announcement date.

evidence.title: Coinbase to buy derivatives exchange Deribit in a $2.9 billion deal
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous report on the acquisition agreement preceding completion.

evidence.title: Coinbase strikes $2.9 billion deal for major crypto options platform
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous report on Coinbase's agreement to acquire Deribit.

evidence.title: Deribit official website
evidence.notes: Official website verifies the continuing Deribit exchange service.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange reference for Deribit
evidence.notes: Independent directory reference retained from the original candidate review.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Deribit
evidence.notes: Specific independent profile corroborates the Deribit identity and current exchange activity.

evidence.title: About Us
evidence.notes: Official profile states that Deribit launched in June 2016 after more than two years of development.

evidence.title: Introducing The Deribit Perpetual
evidence.notes: Official retrospective states that Deribit went live in June 2016.

evidence.title: Deribit Joins Coinbase: Unlocking the Future of Global Crypto Derivatives
evidence.notes: Deribit announced that Coinbase had closed the acquisition and that Deribit was now part of Coinbase.

evidence.title: Deribit Joins Coinbase: Unlocking the Future of Global Crypto Derivatives
evidence.notes: Coinbase investor announcement states that the acquisition had closed.
